## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `vp check` is green (format · lint · typecheck)
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` is green
- [ ] the relevant **doc page** is updated 1:1 with the change
- [ ] Conventional Commit message (`feat(scope): …`)
- [ ] a changeset is added _(once releases are set up)_
